case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. AUNER EDELMA SANCHEZ BARRIOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED APR-24-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, AUNER EDELMA SANCHEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT AUNER EDELMA SANCHEZ BARRIOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRIOS, AUNER EDELMA SANCHEZ $936.87 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $936.87 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, AUNER EDELMA SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
